passes.title: Christian Science Plaza
passes.benefit_text:
The $10‑off discount can be applied for up to 6 guests with just one library pass. Guests will need to present the physical library pass at the gate.
The discount can only be redeemed with the physical library pass, so please be sure to bring it with you. Photos or reservation emails cannot be accepted, and we want to make sure no one misses out on their savings!
Davis Farmland & Davis Mega Maze are open weather and ground conditions permitting. Please check DavisFarmland.com or DavisMegaMaze.com for up-to-date schedules and weather-related closings.
**Adults must be accompanied by at least one child age 12 or younger when visiting our Children’s Discovery Farm. Davis Mega Maze is great for all ages.
source_phrases: The $10‑off discount can be applied for up to 6 guests with just one library pass. Guests will need to present the physical library pass at the gate.

The discount can only be redeemed with the physical library pass, so please be sure to bring it with you. Photos or reservation emails cannot be accepted, and we want to make sure no one misses out on their savings!
Davis Farmland & Davis Mega Maze are open weather and ground conditions permitting. Please check DavisFarmland.com or DavisMegaMaze.com for up-to-date schedules and weather-related closings.
**Adults must be accompanied by at least one child age 12 or younger when visiting our Children’s Discovery Farm. Davis Mega Maze is great for all ages.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text: This pass admits 4 visitors at $5 per person. Under 18 years admitted free. Tickets are purchased online, and you will need to show the confirmed tickets AND your library pass email/coupon code for entry into the museum.  See website for latest hours, holidays and closings.
source_phrases: This pass admits 4 visitors at $5 per person. Under 18 years admitted free. Tickets are purchased online, and you will need to show the confirmed tickets AND your library pass email/coupon code for entry into the museum.  See website for latest hours, holidays and closings.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text: Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card  (no museum pass needed) at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. Children 12 and under receive free admission to the Museum.
source_phrases: Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card  (no museum pass needed) at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. Children 12 and under receive free admission to the Museum.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Free parking for one vehicle at Massachusetts State Parks. Available March through December.
This pass must be returned to the library the day following the checkout.
source_phrases: Free parking for one vehicle at Massachusetts State Parks. Available March through December.
This pass must be returned to the library the day following the checkout.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits 2 people at $15 per person (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7-17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). Children 6 and under are admitted free. There is no discount for children 7-17 for general admission, currently $10.
After reserving the library's pass, you will receive a email with a code that you must use to book tickets directly from the MFA. You do not need to bring the library pass to the Museum. You will be e-mailed your ticket(s). Please show Museum staff on a device or a printed copy.
Museum hours:
Sunday    10 am–5 pm Monday    10 am–5 pm Tuesday    Closed Wednesday    10 am–5 pm Thursday    10 am–10 pm Friday    10 am–10 pm Saturday    10 am–5 pm
 Visit mfa.org for information about health, safety, and what’s on view.
source_phrases: Each pass admits 2 people at $15 per person (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7-17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). Children 6 and under are admitted free. There is no discount for children 7-17 for general admission, currently $10.

After reserving the library's pass, you will receive a email with a code that you must use to book tickets directly from the MFA. You do not need to bring the library pass to the Museum. You will be e-mailed your ticket(s). Please show Museum staff on a device or a printed copy.
Museum hours:
Sunday    10 am–5 pm Monday    10 am–5 pm Tuesday    Closed Wednesday    10 am–5 pm Thursday    10 am–10 pm Friday    10 am–10 pm Saturday    10 am–5 pm
Visit mfa.org for information about health, safety, and what’s on view.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
- This coupon allows 50% off standard admission to the New England Aquarium.
- Only applies to adult and child pricing.
- This is not a ticket.
- Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
- Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
- Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
source_phrases: - This coupon allows 50% off standard admission to the New England Aquarium.
- Only applies to adult and child pricing.
- This is not a ticket.
- Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
- Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
- Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
- Valid only for Aquarium admission.
- This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
- Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold.
- Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
- Hours of operation are subject to change.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
Library passes for North Shore Children's Museum admit up to 5 people (adults and children over 12 months) at 50% admission price.  As of January 1, 2024, this is an ePass that can either be presented on a mobile device or as a print-out to receive the discounted admission rate in-person.
Advanced ticket purchase is strongly recommended but not required. The discounted admission rate can be accessed on our website by selecting Library Museum Pass on the ticketing page . Your library pass will only be honored on the date you reserve. If the museum reaches capacity, visitors will be let in on a one in, one out basis.
If you have any questions or issues when reserving tickets, reach out to us at nscminfo@peabody-ma.gov or 978-538-5765.
Hours of operation:
Wednesday, 1:00 pm – 4:00 pm
Thursday, 9:00 am – 12:00 pm, 1:00 pm – 4:00 pm
source_phrases: Library passes for North Shore Children's Museum admit up to 5 people (adults and children over 12 months) at 50% admission price.  As of January 1, 2024, this is an ePass that can either be presented on a mobile device or as a print-out to receive the discounted admission rate in-person.

Advanced ticket purchase is strongly recommended but not required. The discounted admission rate can be accessed on our website by selecting Library Museum Pass on the ticketing page . Your library pass will only be honored on the date you reserve. If the museum reaches capacity, visitors will be let in on a one in, one out basis.
If you have any questions or issues when reserving tickets, reach out to us at nscminfo@peabody-ma.gov or 978-538-5765.
Hours of operation:
Wednesday, 1:00 pm – 4:00 pm
Thursday, 9:00 am – 12:00 pm, 1:00 pm – 4:00 pm
Friday, 9:00 am – 12:00 pm, 1:00 pm – 5:00 pm
Saturday, 9:00 am – 12:00 pm, 12:00 pm – 2:00 pm
Sunday, 12:00 pm – 4:00 pm
Visit museum website for more information.

passes.title: North Shore Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text: This e-pass allows for a reduced admission for up to 2 people at $12 per person.
source_phrases: This e-pass allows for a reduced admission for up to 2 people at $12 per person.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass admits up to 10 people at 30% off the general admission price.
source_phrases: This pass admits up to 10 people at 30% off the general admission price.

passes.title: Real Pirates Salem
passes.benefit_text: These discount codes can be redeemed online, or in-person. The discount saves $5 off each paid ticket for up to 4 tickets.
source_phrases: These discount codes can be redeemed online, or in-person. The discount saves $5 off each paid ticket for up to 4 tickets.

passes.title: Roger Williams Park Zoo
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits up to 6 people at a rate of $13.50 for Adults and $11.25 for Children (Ages 6-18).
This pass must be returned to the library by 10am on the day following the reservation.
source_phrases: This pass admits up to 6 people at a rate of $13.50 for Adults and $11.25 for Children (Ages 6-18).
This pass must be returned to the library by 10am on the day following the reservation.

passes.title: Salem Witch Museum
passes.benefit_text: This code provides 50% off all play passes for up to 6 guests per day. Tickets can be reserved online using the code or purchased in person.
source_phrases: This code provides 50% off all play passes for up to 6 guests per day. Tickets can be reserved online using the code or purchased in person.

passes.title: Sandmagination
passes.benefit_text:
This pass allows two adults and up to 4 children at 50% off the cost of regular admission. Library pass holders are still required to pay the NH State Parks use fee for Odiorne Point State Park.
This pass must be picked up at the library.
source_phrases: This pass allows two adults and up to 4 children at 50% off the cost of regular admission. Library pass holders are still required to pay the NH State Parks use fee for Odiorne Point State Park.
This pass must be picked up at the library.

passes.title: Strawbery Banke Museum
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits 6 people at $9.00 for adults and $6.00 for children. Under age 2 years admitted free. Visit Zoo New England website for hours, updates. This pass can't be used for Stone Zoo "Zoolights" or Franklin Park Zoo "Boston Lights".
source_phrases: Pass admits 6 people at $9.00 for adults and $6.00 for children. Under age 2 years admitted free. Visit Zoo New England website for hours, updates. This pass can't be used for Stone Zoo "Zoolights" or Franklin Park Zoo "Boston Lights".
